nodes.name: Striated wren-babbler
nodes.summary: Striated wren-babbler（Ptilocichla mindanensis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Striated wren-babbler。

nodes.name: Bornean wren-babbler
nodes.summary: Bornean wren-babbler（Ptilocichla leucogrammica）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Bornean wren-babbler。

nodes.name: Ptilocichla
nodes.summary: Ptilocichla（Ptilocichla）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如Striated wren-babbler、Bornean wren-babbler、Falcated wren-babbler。

nodes.name: Falcated wren-babbler
